name: formatting
description: Evaluates formatting, compilation hygiene, and placeholder discipline.

criteria.5: No formatting issues; all declarations typecheck; sorry only in proofs or explicit opaque placeholders; no non-Lean artifacts
criteria.4: Compiles cleanly with good hygiene; placeholders are stable (opaque/axiom stubs); only minor cosmetic issues
criteria.3: All declarations typecheck and compile as-is; sorry confined to theorem proofs; minor issues (unused imports, warnings) do not affect compilation
criteria.2: Compiles only with significant manual patching; multiple unresolved typeclass/coercion issues; non-Lean artifacts remain
criteria.1: File does not compile; syntax/type errors, missing imports, broken namespaces; non-Lean artifacts break parsing
criteria.0: Completely broken — cannot parse or elaborate at all
